reviews.review_description: I loved the zombie land movie. I love the fact that the game has the characters in it.

reviews.review_title: Would I buy it again? Yes
reviews.review_description:
Gameplay perfect
Arcade mode perfect 
Voice acting perfect 
Game with a plot perfect
Challenging and fun without motion sickness
Play once and done? Nope.
Zombies?  yes.  Horror scare? No
Probably the best single player game made for VR.
fast paced , short game

The graphics look really cheap, and the tinkling music is extremely annoying.
The weapon handling and reloading mechanics aren't fun. Arizona Sunshine was way better back then.
And then the game just wouldn't progress after selecting a level. I stand around stupidly in the hub and can't select anything anymore. I can't teleport to anyone anymore, and the level just won't start.
I uninstalled it immediately. Luckily, I didn't pay any money for it, since it was included in the Quest+ subscription.

Bought this ages ago played it once if had known i could have got refund back then i would have. I get the realistic mag reloading people what it to feel real BUT we are holding 2 big plastic controllers that aren't cheap too replace and you spend so much time bashing controllers together every reload no the only time this mechanic will work well is when haptic gloves become a real thing.

reviews.review_title: Like a zombie run gun club
reviews.review_description:
Got this on sale, but have put in some efforts to progress all the same.
Great arcade style and characters.
Plays really well, and definitely presents a challenge, especially with a handicap of sitting down.
Recommend standing for later stages.
How did the quality on q3 go down.. not the visuals but laggy and keeps having screen tears and lagging, sometimes whole screen sometimes a button press but how?
For me I liked it a lot because it is a simple game but at the same time super entertaining. And beating time faster is super fun 👌🏻

It is a on the rails shooter,so there is no free movement in this game. With that being said,it is very similar to the movie. It has over the top action with a comedy twist. The shooting mechanics work great,it has different zombie types,including some that will throw things at you. If you’re into the Zombieland movie and on the rails shooters,this is the game for you.however,if you’re looking for something with the depth of Walking Dead:Saints & Sinners or a storyline like Arizona Sunshine,I would look elsewhere

This is my favorite game, my only complaint is the fact that I have played all courses repeatedly. After a while, you get bored with the same scenery. Are there any plans for adding new locations? I would love a new level or location every now and again.
I’m a 45 year old woman! This game was so fun my kids loved it as well.
Love the game play. My favorite game by far. Sometimes will glitch and take a few to get back on track.
This game is really fun I like it
The only game, where you got killed with a dil*o ^^

reviews.review_title: I see why it's free with quest+
reviews.review_description: Enjoyed the game and then all the sudden it stopped grabbing secondary weapon. And definitely has issues reloading the weapons. Won't reload while swinging up and down through the ammo.
There’s something wrong with this game. I tried many times but unable to install it

reviews.review_title: XR needs to be shut down!! ASAP
reviews.review_description:
Update September 9th 2024 I knew Hitman 3 reloaded was going to be trash! I hope your studio is forced to close. That's a hard pass on Hitman 3 & any other game you develop in the future! . Your studio can't be trusted. how long has it been & still no Quest 3 update to zombieland? I have emails talking with you guys because you guys asked me to reach out regarding how poor the game looks on the Quest 3 compared to Quest 2 & you wanted my feedback. well, I gave it & still upon reviewing the game none of the issues have been resolved. yet you want people to pre-order Hitman. I hope your studio is forced to close your doors permanently after Hitman. I'm so tired of the non-transparent lies and broken promises that Meta's platform delivers ripping off people. Have you guys not been watching the reviews? The only one praising Hitman 3 reloaded for the Quest 3 is children acting like impatient little Bratz this is completely unacceptable. it tells me everything I need to know about how XR Games conducts business you guys paint such a vivid picture of neglect that even a jury wouldn't deny. The Gaming Industry Needs a Wake-Up Call. there's a serious issue plaguing the gaming industry. Paid by sponsored YouTubers &  young inexperienced gamers and their unchecked spending habits. Parents often use consoles as digital babysitters, allowing their kids to make impulsive purchases without understanding the long-term consequences. This has led to a disturbing trend where broken, cash-grab titles are praised and supported, perpetuating a cycle of mediocrity. These young gamers, who haven’t yet experienced the value of earning their own money, are quick to buy into hype and leave glowing reviews for subpar games. They don’t second-guess their purchases, and as a result, developers and publishers continue to push out unfinished products, promising to fix them over time. This “cash for trash” & "fix it over time" mentality needs to end. I will leave you with this, XR games I hope your studio is forced to close after this blatant-betrayal the current rate in which studios are closing proves gamers are waking up, zombie army will be denied by The Gaming community. We will accept no apologies for Hitman 3. you guys knew what you were doing, it went from a summer release date, to a fall release date, yet. you guys had the nerve to release it on September 5th knowing it's deplorable state. I will be starting a petition to have Hitman 3 reloaded removed from the Meta store along with grid Legends the fact that these games have been allowed to stay up, raises some concerning red flags.

If you can live with everything I said & still want to purchase it, let me save you money!

If you want a 15% off referral for the game just message me directly by clicking on my  circle photo profile icon. 

PS My opinion is mine and mine alone. Not swayed by public opinion, shady companies, or paid sponsor YouTubers. You can’t sway me, lie to me, or bribe me. I believe what I see, not what I’m told.
it has no good weapon to play, 1 touch is enough u loose and fxxxcking back to the beggining

reviews.review_title: I am not left handed issue corrected
reviews.review_description:
Game is cool and fun, could be lots to like.  However my wife played it first, and she is left handed. Now the gun will not switch to the right hand no matter what I do. I can't hot the broad side of a Homer with my left hand. Would give the game 4 or 5 stars if I could actually play it for more than 5 minutes without getting super frustrated at the gun hand  being stuck on lefty. Seriously, I will change my rating if someone actually gives me a fix for this that works cause so far everything I have read and tried has not so I am.stuck shooting lefty.

Update, developer advice fixed the, only downside was I had to restart the game and lost saved progress, luckily I wasn't very far in yet. Lots of fun now

developer_response.body:
Hey Webbco138.

You can change the dominant hand in settings, which you can access while pausing the game.

Let us know if that works for you!

If not, please email us at zombieland@xrgames.io and we'll do what we can!

Cheers.

reviews.review_description:
Amazing game great graphics compared to most of the games ive played so far and hands down the most entertaining game so far only down side is no coop play 

Fans of the movie and newcomers alike will love this game as you train your shooting hands for the zombie invertational hopefully youll see my name lights lmao x

I really like this game it a fun game.I waiting on a new update on this game it really a fun game to play I play it a lot and wonder when a update comes ….. Thanks you and we need a update on this games

Had a blast playing this.  It's fast and I think my reflexes are improving a bit with playing this.  I find it challenging and fun.     The main thing they pulled off with this game is the focus on fun.

Definitely worth a purchase and a play.   Hopefully we get a sequel.

I love this game so much. Everything about it is great.

I really hope they add more levels or bring out headshot fever 2 :)

Had this game a week and can’t get off it. Reminds me of the old HotD games. Plenty of levels and challenges plus replay value from getting better ranks on each level. I’ve gave it 4 rating might’ve pushed to a 4.5 if could do half stars. Just needs a multiplayer mode and some kind of horde mode and this game would be a 6 out of 5, maybe a 7.

If you're a zombieland fan I recommend this one game for you it is addictive and I've been on it all day off and on having to recharge my Oculus 2. So if you're wake me in a zombieland fan you're going to want to get a power pack charger for your Oculus 2 or your VR device and I would definitely have a couple batteries because I am addicted to it I have to put on headphones my wife says so it doesn't disturb her from watching The Golden girls in the memory of Betty White losing her today but again if you're a zombieland fan this is the game for you guys.

If your not in the mood for a long winded complex shooter, then jump into the world of Zombieland where you can spend hours replaying the short but sweet levels to beat your own score, upgrade weapons and unlock achievements. 

I personally like playing this when I'm feeling lazy and feel like sitting down and just blasting the head of zombies and improving my accuracy with these double tap headshots. It has a satisfying bullet time mode which kicks in after a couple of headshots. 

Non of that joystick movement which makes you dizzy. Just move your head , point, aim and fire. 
It's not designed for co-op or multiplayer yet it's still a highly competitive game when you trying to beat over scores from people around the world.
I love this game! Its definitely got the ‘one more go!’ draw to it, the action doesn’t bring on motion sickness for me unlike most shooters. Highly recommend!

This is my first ever game on VR and I am hooked. Game play is responsive and super exciting. Easy enough for beginners and definitely more testing as your skill levels improve. I can play this game all day!!!
I have to play with auto load but makes it so fun!  Great game!

I got this game for free after a Friend gave me a code for it and even if they didn't I would buy this game in a heartbeat. The humour is charming and understands what made the film's so great. The gameplay too is amazing and comfortable in both standing up and sitting down. As a first time VR user this was the first game I played experiencing no form of motion sickness at all. All and all this game is a fun action packed on the rails shooter that I would recommend.
I absolutely love this game. It’s brilliant. Definitely recommend to anyone who loves shooting zombies. I can’t stop playing this game. It’s so good :-)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the brilliant review. If you fancy competing against other zombie slayers, sign up for our eSports tournament with VRML: https://www.zombielandvrgame.com.

reviews.review_description: I can't play vr games that move you, makes me nauseous letting the game move me vs letting me control my movements.  I couldn't even get past the first part of the game.  Look else where if you need locomotion movement.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE 18/06/21

Hey!

Just wanted to get back in touch to mention our brand new Kingpin Update which dropped yesterday.

We know you weren't a fan of the locomotion system in our game, but we're hoping that our new update brings you back for another try.

Yesterday's big update includes a brand new level, two new additional 'remixed' levels, Quest 2 upgrades, Quest 1 improvements, massive Rift upgrades, new shadows, lighting, cloud saves, level changes and more!

If you do decide to give Zombieland another go, let us know what you think of the new content!

- - - 

ORIGINAL RESPONSE:

Hey! Thanks for your review. We wanted to explain our decisions behind the movement in this game.

Our traversal system was designed in such a way to make it fast and easy to quickly zip through a level with minimal player interaction.

To reduce nausea we let the player control when they want to move to the next area, done by looking at the blue icon.

In extensive user testing, we found this to create the least nauseating effect. Folks who previously felt nauseous in VR, didn’t. We also wanted to ensure that our method of traversal was as pain-free as possible for many different types of players; from hardened VR veterans to first timers.

In future patches we’re looking to add a “Toggle Auto Move ON/OFF” option.

We’re sorry to hear it’s had this effect on you, but we wanted to share how we tried very hard to eliminate any nausea.

reviews.review_description: I just played the demo yesterday at work. Knew I had to buy it this morning... and I have not even started. It's downloading to My oculus as I write this review. It's a must buy
got boring fast

reviews.review_title: Me and my husband enjoyed this game
reviews.review_description: I can’t stand long so this game was perfect for me and helped have a fun Saturday night with my husband with laughs at trying to get the set up under control. Love the visuals and actors in the game!
Great game 👍
great price, just got my quest and this was one of the first games i played!
Great zombie shooter experience probably best on oculus if your just looking to jump in and shoot zombies. Definitely get more out of the game than expected!

It locks certain depth when it comes to customizing weapons and story but if you read this you'll understand why doesn't really matter in the long run but overall this is actually a pretty fun game. Getting the quest 2 I was expecting to play a lot more games with the thumb sticks and be able to move freely in the environment but this wasn't the case with Zombieland. 

So this game actually isn't a free roaming game whatsoever. The goal of the game is to get headshots to take time off of your overall time at the end of each level. Every time that you're done killing a set amount of zombies that they throw your way all you have to do is look towards the direction of a blue orb that's on the ground and it teleports your character there. It's very unfortunate because I bought this game expecting it to be a little bit more wacky, fun, free roaming but that's not what I got at all.

I got this game in a bundle deal so it wasn't too bad of a purchase but the other game that I got is the exact same way except it's more boring and a lot slower pace.

This game is perfect if you have a couple of people over because it's super easy for newbies to play this game since you don't have to move on your own. This is something that I would expect to be in an arcade. If anyone has played Time crisis you've played this. I will admit though, it is pretty fun for me and the wife to try to beat each other's times. The fact that I was expecting something free roam and didn't get that sucks but the rest of the game actually makes up for it in terms of pickup and play and not have to worry about a storyline. 

Hope you found this helpful 🤘
I bought this and it won't load looking for refund

developer_response.body:
Hey!

Just wanted to let you know that late last week Facebook released a fix for the black screen issues you experienced.

Could you update your headset and let us know if that fixes the issue?

If it does, we'd love it if you would consider updating your review score accordingly!

Thanks.
